mapper.sql: id, employee_id, plan_id, basic_salary, position_salary, performance_salary, probation_ratio, social_insurance_base, housing_fund_base, status, effective_date, effective_start_date, effective_end_date, change_reason, operator_id, create_time, update_time, encryption_version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM salary_account WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY effective_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT sa.id, sa.employee_id, sa.plan_id, sa.basic_salary, sa.position_salary, sa.performance_salary, sa.probation_ratio, sa.social_insurance_base, sa.housing_fund_base, sa.status, sa.effective_date, sa.effective_start_date, sa.effective_end_date, sa.change_reason, sa.operator_id, sa.create_time, sa.update_time, sa.encryption_version FROM salary_account sa INNER JOIN employee e ON sa.employee_id = e.id WHERE sa.status = 1 AND e.status IN (1, 2)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO salary_account ( employee_id, plan_id, basic_salary, position_salary, performance_salary, probation_ratio, social_insurance_base, housing_fund_base, status, effective_date, effective_start_date, effective_end_date, change_reason, operator_id, encryption_version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{planId}, #{basicSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{positionSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{performanceSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{probationRatio}, #{socialInsuranceBase, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{housingFundBase, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{effectiveDate}, #{effectiveStartDate}, #{effectiveEndDate}, #{changeReason}, #{operatorId}, 1, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE salary_account SET plan_id = #{planId}, basic_salary = #{basicSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, position_salary = #{positionSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, performance_salary = #{performanceSalary, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, probation_ratio = #{probationRatio}, social_insurance_base = #{socialInsuranceBase, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, housing_fund_base = #{housingFundBase, typeHandler=com.hrms.crypto.EncryptedBigDecimalTypeHandler}, effective_start_date = #{effectiveStartDate}, effective_end_date = #{effectiveEndDate}, change_reason = #{changeReason}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE salary_account SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
